commands.review_summary:
The PR adds Telegram doctor imports for legacy bot-info and forum topic-name sidecar caches into plugin KV state, plus exact-key support for unscoped plugin-state imports and regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main moved these caches to plugin state while doctor only detects the Telegram message-cache sidecar. A scratch legacy bot-info/topic-name sidecar plus doctor detection would reproduce the ignored-cache path, though I did not run it because this review is read-only.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because I found no concrete code defect; the remaining blocker is contributor-supplied real doctor upgrade proof and normal maintainer review.

target.title: Fix Telegram legacy cache migration
target.body:
Summary
- Adds doctor legacy-state imports for Telegram bot-info and forum topic-name cache sidecars into plugin KV state.
- Allows plugin-state imports with an empty scope key so caches whose namespace already encodes scope keep exact runtime keys.
- Adds regressions for both Telegram sidecars and unscoped plugin-state imports.

Verification
- node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run extensions/telegram/src/state-migrations.test.ts src/commands/doctor-state-migrations.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot-info-cache.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/topic-name-cache.test.ts
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.extensions.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/telegram-legacy-migrations-extensions.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.extensions.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/telegram-legacy-migrations-extensions-test.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/telegram-legacy-migrations-core.tsbuildinfo
- node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental --tsBuildInfoFile .artifacts/tsgo-cache/telegram-legacy-migrations-core-test.tsbuildinfo
- git diff --check
- .agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local

Behavior addressed: Telegram legacy bot-info and forum topic-name sidecar caches from before PR #86027 are now imported into plugin KV state instead of being silently ignored.
Real environment tested: local OpenClaw checkout on Linux.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: targeted Vitest migration/cache tests plus extension/core tsgo lanes listed above.
Evidence after fix: tests assert bot-info sidecars import account-keyed entries, topic-name sidecars import exact chat/thread keys, and unscoped plugin-state imports archive after exact-key migration.
Observed result after fix: all listed checks passed after rebasing onto latest origin/main.
What was not tested: live Telegram E2E, because this fix is offline legacy state migration rather than send/receive runtime behavior.
target.author: obviyus
